DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT SUSAN YEN'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION IS MOOT AS A RESPONSE HAS BEEN SERVED. THE COURT WILL NOT RULE UPON THAT RESPONSE ON THIS MOTION, BUT COUNSEL IS ADVISED THAT THE COURT WOULD BE INCLINED TO FIND THAT THE RESPONSE REQUIRES SUPPLEMENTATION AS SUGGESTED BY THE REPLY. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE LATE RESPONSES WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $590, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Requests For Production And For Imposition Of Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Aug-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Susan Yen's Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production is moot as a response has been served. The court will not rule upon that response on this motion, but counsel is advised that the court would be inclined to find that the response requires supplementation as suggested by the reply. The court finds that the late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $590, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (EAH/612)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2008 Set For Trial On Jan-05-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-19-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 604

NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING- THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT SUSAN YEN'S MOTION For Leave To File Amended Answer IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB)
